hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /home/user/lifeplanner-saas-template && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); BLOCKED=(.env .env.local .env.production secrets credentials); for p in "${BLOCKED[@]}"; do if [[ "$(basename "$FILE")" == "$p"* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *".env.example" ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify $FILE (secrets file)" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0
